completions: The study found a 15% increase in productivity when remote work was adopted. Key factors included flexible schedules and reduced commute time.

ground_truth.source_text: A recent corporate study revealed that remote work adoption led to a 15% increase in overall productivity. Researchers attributed this to two main factors: the flexibility of self-managed schedules and the elimination of daily commute time.

completions: The report highlights three risks: data breaches, phishing attacks, and insider threats. Mitigation strategies include encryption, training, and access controls.

ground_truth.source_text: The cybersecurity report identifies three primary risks: data breaches, phishing attacks, and insider threats. Recommended mitigation strategies are end-to-end encryption, regular employee training programs, and strict access control policies.

completions: Sales grew 20% year-over-year, driven by the new product line.

ground_truth.source_text: Annual sales figures show a 20% year-over-year growth, primarily driven by the successful launch of the new premium product line in Q2.
